channel.title: Projects on seraph
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on seraph

item.title: Pastebin
item.description: A self-hosted pastebin written in Rust. Syntax highlighting, burn-after-read, expiring pastes, and password protection.

item.title: QR Code Generator
item.description: A self-hosted QR code generator written in Rust. Outputs SVG and PNG, supports logo embedding and print mode.

item.title: seraph-mail
item.description: A bespoke webmail client built on top of docker-mailserver. IMAP/SMTP, dark mode, inline images, and a UI that actually looks the way I want.

item.title: Rust URL Shortener
item.description: A self-hosted link shortener written in Rust using Axum and PostgreSQL.
